title: Directing users to a new tab when opening a notification or update
excerpt:
When opening up a notification or update, it would be great if this prompted a new tab to open and take you to the relevant workspace, instead of navigating from your existing browser tab.

posts.author: Charley (Charley)
posts.cookedHtml:
When opening up a notification or update, it would be great if this prompted a new tab to open and take you to the relevant workspace, instead of navigating from your existing browser tab.

This would be very useful for my organisation that works across many different workspaces.
